results.question: Which month in 2023 had the highest total gross profit?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT MONTH_NUM, MONTH_NAME,
       SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE YEAR = 2023
GROUP BY MONTH_NUM, MONTH_NAME
ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the total revenue by product category?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.product_category,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY p.product_category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What are the top 5 products by total revenue?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.product_name,
       p.product_category,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY p.product_src_id, p.product_name, p.product_category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

results.question: What is the total revenue for the Footwear category?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id WHERE p.product_category = 'Footwear';
results.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d   ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
WHERE p.product_category = 'Footwear'
GROUP BY d.year
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What is the average profit margin by product category?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_category, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_category ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC;
results.generated_sql:

       AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS average_profit_margin
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d   ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY p.product_category
ORDER BY average_profit_margin DESC NULLS LAST

results.question: What is the total quantity sold by product category?

results.question: What is the total revenue by product category for each year?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.year, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, p.product_category ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql:

       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue,
       YEAR  = d.year
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f

JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY p.product_category, YEAR
ORDER BY YEAR, total_revenue DESC

results.question: Who are the top 5 customers from the United States by total revenue in 2023?
results.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND c.customer_country = 'United States' AND d.year = 2023 GROUP BY c.customer_src_id, c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id
                              AND c.is_active = TRUE
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d   ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE c.customer_country = 'United States'
      AND d.year         = 2023
GROUP BY c.customer_src_id, c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

results.question: What is the total revenue by sales channel and product category?
results.gold_sql: SELECT j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category ORDER BY j.junk_sales_channel, total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What is the total revenue by store state for each year?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.year, s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, s.store_branch_state ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;

       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue

JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d   ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id
GROUP BY s.store_branch_state, d.year
ORDER BY s.store_branch_state, d.year

results.question: How many transactions were placed on weekends?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS weekend_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.is_weekend = TRUE;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT j.junk_shipment_status, COUNT(*) AS number_of_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE d.is_weekend = TRUE
GROUP BY j.junk_shipment_status

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions placed on weekends versus weekdays?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.is_weekend, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.is_weekend ORDER BY d.is_weekend;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.is_weekend = TRUE THEN f.transaction_sale_amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_on_weekends,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.is_weekend = FALSE THEN f.transaction_sale_amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_on_weekdays
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
GROUP BY d.is_weekend

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions where the discount was greater than 20%?
